name: KBS Auto Service and Repair
tagline: Your go-to destination for top-quality car maintenance and repairs
description: KBS Auto Service and Repair is a trusted automotive repair workshop located in Sunshine, VIC. With skilled and experienced technicians, the business delivers exceptional service across routine maintenance and complex repairs. Known for honest and transparent pricing with no hidden fees, KBS Auto is committed to ensuring every vehicle runs smoothly and safely.
